heading: Report by General Services Administration
label: 8262a Report by General Services Administration
text: Not later than one year after , and annually thereafter, the Administrator of General Services shall report to the Committee on Governmental Affairs and the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate and the Committee on Energy and Commerce, the Committee on Government Operations, and the Committee on Public Works and Transportation of the House of Representatives on the activities of the General Services Administration conducted pursuant to this subtitle.October 24, 19921See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis subtitle, referred to in text, is subtitle F (§§ 151–168) of title I of , , , which enacted this section and sections 8258a, 8258b, 8262a to 8262k of this title, amended sections 8252 to 8256, 8258, 8259, 8287, and 8287c of this title and section 490 of former Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, enacted provisions set out as notes under and former , The Congress, and repealed provisions set out as a note under . For complete classification of subtitle F to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 102–486106 Stat. 2843section 8262h of this titlesection 1815 of Title 2section 8253 of this titleOct. 24, 1992
CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Energy Policy Act of 1992, and not as part of the National Energy Conservation Policy Act which comprises this chapter.
